parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so repeated refreshes for the same tenant coalesce, while unrelated tenants can refresh concurrently instead of being serialized behind one global mutex.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"auth_refresh_session.md","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"rationale":"The cited message states that per-tenant keys prevent duplicate same-tenant refreshes while avoiding unnecessary cross-tenant blocking from a global mutex.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing retry queue rationale","Markdown parser onboarding cleanup"]}
